title: RURAL HEALTH CLINIC - 211info
text: GRANT COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT RURAL HEALTH CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patient centered health care. Services include: annual exams (including gynecological exams), care for acute and chronic conditions, pregnancy testing, STD/STI screening, immunizations, mental health evaluation, and health screenings. 528 East Main Street Suite E John Day, OR 978455415 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-noon and 1pm-6pm (541) 575-0429 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 575-0429 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts private insurance for all programs offered, including Medicare, Medicaid, and Oregon Health Plan. Offers self-pay individuals a sliding fee based on income. DOCUMENTS: Proof of insurance if applicable AREA SERVED: Grant County Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Pap Tests Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GRANT COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT
